response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:18: Identified as introductory talk by Sakura Miko and Inugami Korone. 2. 02:18: Detected start of 'Fashion Monster'. On-screen text identified 'Yasutaka Nakata' as composer. 3. Searched for 'ファッションモンスター きゃりーぱみゅぱみゅ lyrics'. Found lyrics and translation. 4. Verified the song title as 'Fashion Monster' and original composer as Yasutaka Nakata. 5. Mapped the scenes and included full lyrics as required.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual reality musical performance by VTubers Sakura Miko and Inugami Korone. The video begins with an introductory dialogue and then transitions into a full performance of the song 'Fashion Monster' by Kyary Pamyu Pamyu, with music produced by Yasutaka Nakata. The video concludes shortly after the performance ends.

scenes.description: The VTuber Sakura Miko interacts with the audience, discusses stage themes, and introduces her guest, Inugami Korone, in anticipation of the upcoming song.
Sakura Miko and Inugami Korone perform a full version of the song 'Fashion Monster'. The staging includes various decorations, reflecting the song's theme.
